title: OpenAI Just Open-Sourced 'Symphony' , Build AI Agent Teams T
hook: OpenAI open-sourced Symphony , build AI agent teams for free. This is INSANE for small business.
body:
**Hook:** OpenAI open-sourced Symphony , build AI agent teams for free. This is INSANE for small business.

**What dropped:** April 27, 2026 , OpenAI Blog
OpenAI open-sourced Symphony , an orchestration specification for connecting multiple AI agents. Think of it as 'conductor software' that tells different AI tools when to act, what data to share, and how to hand off tasks. Codex agents, ChatGPT, and third-party tools can now coordinate.

**Price:** Free (open source). Apache 2.0 license.

**Why it matters:** Instead of 5 separate AI subscriptions that don't talk, you build one 'team' of agents that handle leads, quotes, scheduling, and follow-ups , automatically.

**5-minute setup:**
1. Go to github.com/openai/symphony → download the spec
2. Define your 'orchestra': LeadAgent (qualifies), QuoteAgent (prices), ScheduleAgent (books), FollowAgent (checks in)
3. Write the symphony file in YAML: 'When LeadAgent scores > 7, trigger QuoteAgent. When QuoteAgent finishes, trigger ScheduleAgent.'
4. Deploy on your server or use OpenAI's hosted Symphony runner
5. Monitor: Symphony dashboard shows which agent did what, when, and success rate

**Result:** 5 manual handoffs per lead → 0 handoffs. Lead to booked appointment in 8 minutes without human touch.

**CTA:** DM me **SYMPHONY** for the OpenAI Symphony , Build Your First 3-Agent Team.

**Hook:** Claude Code auto-picks the best AI model for each task. Build custom business tools in 45 minutes.

**What dropped:** April-May 2026 , Anthropic / Claude Code Release Notes
Claude Code (terminal-based coding agent) shipped major updates: smarter model auto-selection, project purge tools, stronger permission handling, improved OAuth. It reads your entire codebase, plans multi-file changes, writes code, runs tests. Now it picks the best model for each subtask automatically.

**Price:** Included in Claude Pro ($20/mo) or Team ($30/user/mo). Usage-based beyond included credits.

**Why it matters:** Want a custom tool for your business but don't know code? Describe it in plain English. Claude Code builds it, tests it, and deploys it , in your terminal.

1. Install: npm install -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code (or curl install script)

3. Type: 'claude' → then describe: 'Build a customer appointment scheduler with email reminders'
4. Claude reads the empty folder, plans the architecture, creates files, installs dependencies, runs tests
5. When done: 'claude deploy' → pushes to Vercel or Replit → gives you a live URL

**Result:** Custom scheduler built in 45 minutes. Previous developer quote: $2,000. Cost: $20/mo Claude subscription.

**CTA:** DM me **CLAUDE_CODE** for the Claude Code , Build Custom Tools Without Learning to Code.
